reviews.comment:
Tuvimos un problema en el vehiculo pasando para ir al bolson un dia sabado, acudimos de urgencia al Automovil club, buscando ayuda para reparar la rotura de una correa. Lastimosamente no tienen un mecánico para este tipo de emergencia pero gracias a un playero pudimos contactar con uno de esa localidad, y por  eso pudimos viajar a destino. Deberían tener algún tipo de asistencia mas que una estacion de servicio normal.

(Translated by Google)
We had car trouble on the way to El Bolsón on a Saturday. We went to the Automóvil Club for help repairing a broken belt. Unfortunately, they don't have a mechanic for this type of emergency, but thanks to a gas station attendant, we were able to contact one in that town, and that's how we got to our destination. They should offer some kind of assistance beyond just a regular gas station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7506649888060018425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTNjZldjRBRRAB
